description_long: This is an L-shaped cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a white countertop and light brown doors and drawer fronts. The longer segment of the cabinet includes three vertical doors and a column of four horizontal drawers, while the shorter segment has two vertical doors. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from wood or engineered wood, with a laminate or painted finish on the exterior. The structure is solid and likely intended for use in environments such as offices, reception areas, or urban public spaces. The top surface is broad and suitable for supporting objects or serving as a workspace.
description: L-shaped cabinet with a white countertop and light brown doors and drawers, featuring a modern, handleless design. The cabinet offers ample storage and a smooth, flat surface for supporting objects.
description_view_0: The cabinet is viewed from above the shorter segment, showing the white countertop and the two brown doors on the shorter side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the cabinet, displaying three vertical doors, four drawers, and two additional doors on the shorter segment.
description_view_2: The cabinet is seen from the back, showing only the plain white rear panels with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_3: This side view shows the long, plain white back of the cabinet, with no visible features or openings.
